detailed_description.heading: Flexible Mounting Adapter for LHG Antennas
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik QuickMOUNT pro LHG (QMP-LHG) is a durable and versatile mounting adapter designed to provide flexible installation options for LHG series antennas. It allows you to easily attach devices such as MikroTik’s LHG models to walls or poles, ensuring secure and stable placement. The adapter supports both vertical and horizontal adjustments, offering precise alignment with fine-tuning up to 140° in both axes. This level of flexibility makes it possible to achieve the best possible signal quality and link stability, which is especially important in long-distance wireless connections. The QuickMOUNT pro is made of strong reinforced plastic, ensuring long-lasting durability in both indoor and outdoor environments. Compatible with any LHG product except the XL, it is ideal for wireless ISPs, network installers, or advanced home users, providing a reliable and cost-effective solution for mounting LHG antennas in offices, industrial facilities, remote sites, or residential properties.
